all of my requirements.

As I mentioned, my house needed a lot of work that I had been delaying for years.
In all, Darren and his team removed my old roof, box vents, exhaust fans, gutters, soffits, and fascia; installed a ridge vent and a new roof;  installed new fascia and soffits;
installed new, wider gutters, leaders, and leaf guards; and replaced seven 25-year-old skylights with new Velux remote-controlled, solar-shade powered skylights.
His excellent crew performed every phase of the job with care and expertise, and they did it amazingly quickly, cleaning the job site daily.

You know, the kind sitting for hours at the dining table trying to make a decision, till the end of the day type. I just couldn't. I was in shock for hours. I said, I can't believe it. I need to take a fourth quote in person to see if it is something wrong with me or with the roofing price.
I was looking for a local company with no ads on the Google and I called the Elegant Exteriors LLC.
Ryan came to our home and from the moment he presented himself, his company and the process of the roof replacement, I knew we would be in good hands.
Matt and his crew did an excellent job. The workers was parked in my driveway at 6:45am waiting for Matt to arrive at 7 am sharp and started the work right away. Good communication, excellent teamwork, very organized and very respectful.
And the price for the roof replacement was just a third of the previous quote 👍

title: Domus Construction
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Robert Glavan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuDm7VUg4UX3Mgawek_My5rvNgkuLKXxIIS18_CbW_WL7f7SY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In 2021, Domus Construction installed a new roof on my property. Four years later, in 2025, I experienced a major leak in my living room resulting in over $10,000 worth of damages to my home and personal property. Upon contacting Domus Construction, it took three weeks before they sent anyone to address the issue. The initial "repair" consisted of someone randomly applying silicone to parts of the roof--completely missing the actual source of the leak. It wasn't until two weeks later that a section of the roof was removed and reinstalled, at which point Domus admitted the leak was due to a faulty installation from their original work in 2021. During this repair, I was told that precautions would be taken to protect my pool from construction debris. However, surveillance footage from my outdoor camera clearly shows debris, nails, and even a large metal object falling into my pool. I provided Domus with photographic evidence of this, and they initially claimed they would cover the damages, yet they have not paid, nor have they responded to any further communications. Their customer service has been appalling throughout this process. Office staff have hung up on me during calls, and no one responds to phone calls, emails, or text messages--including their foremen and management team. My insurance company has attempted to contact Domus to recoup the costs of the damages under the warranty and liability claim, but they too have been ignored. Domus Construction has refused to provide proof of their liability insurance to either me or my insurance company, raising concerns about whether they are properly insured at all. Given that they admitted fault in the installation and promised to resolve the issues, this is entirely unacceptable and unprofessional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCu6aaOaukcoOfzEwSzvcO&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Robert McIntosh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJm8MQu5GhzYERD2Y78u3M-78o6-R3IUaWw2vyMJd0ANykIYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Domus did a great Job replacing my windows, roof, and Siding. I worked with David B, Moe, and James. Very professional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0h7YU7prZyiKVRbdqRKn9&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Jarod Armstrong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLk0OLEgdTwUnqPEsOr5isxBV5-lUElEhPN47gShOZIRrHvGu-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Domus turned out to be a solid choice. We met with a spoke to probably a dozen roofers before settling on Domus mainly because we appreciated their transparency and the follow up from Mike who made us really feel like they wanted our business. We negotiated a very good deal on a full roof replacement and new gutters. The roof was completely done in one day of work and the gutters were done by the next afternoon.

Domus never tried to bait and switch us nor did they recommend things we didn’t need to try and up sell us. God willing I’ll never need their help again but they’d be my choice once again if we bought a new place and needed their services.

Let the before and after photos in my review speak for them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj5rjHbw&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2024-4-21"},{"Name":"Daniela Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi9oUF5LaU4ex6lHgX7SEF79FD_hbm9sRlc1GbsjPpyJR1-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst experience ever.
Our house looks nothing like what was promised. We hired this company for a siding project, and they showed us a picture of how our home was supposed to look. Now that the work is finished, it’s completely different — the color is way off. We expected a grayish tone, but it turned out brown. Extremely disappointing and not at all what we agreed to and now there’s “nothing they can do”. They’re very unprofessional and ignore calls and mssgs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrqvdxlqw5JvE6prevXxm8&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Summer Najjar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZKHSXiuCNKy7yCMzzWT1lO8raWV3QUSBjoT2LVrXYt2j-6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had two separate crews work on my roof. The first crew did not do so well, and I was not happy with the job. I'm leaving a four-star review because Domus took accountability, sent a second crew to remedy the issues, and everything turned out nicely in the end. A special thanks to Sal and James for getting everything sorted for me.

The first crew was led by Diego. They arrived in a WeatherSeal Roofing and Gutters van, so maybe try to avoid them specifically. They did a poor job with the copper flashing, and even after they came back to fix it, they left smudge marks you could see from the street. They left a roof vent crooked. The shingles on the rake looked terrible, and they left a cable hanging from my siding they had to come back and cut. Beyond that, they left my property a mess. Bottles and cans were literally shoved into my bushes, and nails were everywhere. There were even random shingles in my lawn. The best part was they left a dumpster on my property 5 days after the roof was done, and since it was plopped right at the end of my driveway, I got two tickets from the town because I was half parked in the sidewalk.

The second team was lead by Luis. These guys were great. They fixed the flashing, corrected the bent roof vent, and put new shingles on the rake. Everything looked clean and sharp. If only I had gotten them in the first place! In the pictures you'll see noticeable difference between Crew 1 and Crew 2.

As I said, the team at Domus were very honest and apologetic over the slew of issues, but nothing will top a crew that gets it done right the first time.

A final note: my final bill was 50% more than I was quoted. I had original tongue in groove decking that Domus said needed replacing. There are a few reviews of others experiencing the same thing, so make sure you read them closely, especially if you're in an older home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH4MPTNQ&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2024-8-30"},{"Name":"Sanooj Sunny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNpXQxmhOO267Y2vN_AJ7X_pgXMlpryhsPyzey2IKr0YB-vxmP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Domus recently replaced our exterior siding and installed a new gutter. Mike, Sales Manager, was professional and provided a reasonable quote, which is why we chose to go with Domus. Mike and James, the project manager, were always available to answer any questions we had. The siding crew was punctual every day and completed the work on schedule. The new siding looks great, and we're very pleased with the outcome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHgLPakAE&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2024-8-30"},{"Name":"Paul Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjy7EzGQFnfnRAPv9Hg9wYqQpV-m8u0qyWPa17sqB5Vw2TFPg9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had my roof replaced by Domus Construction and I couldn't be happier with their work. They were professional, efficient, and affordable.

The first thing I noticed about Domus Roofing was how responsive they were. I got a quote within 24 hours of my initial inquiry and they were able to start work the following week.

The crew arrived on time and got to work immediately. They were very clean and organized, and they took great care of my property.

The work was done in a timely manner and the finished product is beautiful. I especially like the new ventilation system they installed, which really helps with the heat issue I had on my second floor in the summer.

I would highly recommend Domus Roofing to anyone who is looking for a new roof. They are a top-rated company for a reason.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZrOGs4gE&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2023-9-5"},{"Name":"Claudio De Jesus Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLD8oZ-PZC2x2B0kYxA9C96Id8wxDgbBi9T-jsEGIACEkfvfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Domus Roofing did a great and professional job on my roof replament,
They also replaced all my facia boards.
Sal( project manager) came to my house and gave me a very good and honest estimate, and on they day of the job Sal was there to ensure all the work was done correctly. I will definitely use and recommend this company .Thanks to Domus, Sal and his crew my house looks new. By they way they did the job very quickly (5 to 6 hours), and after the job was completed I was amazed on how clean they left my property I didn't find a single nail on the ground.  Thank You Domus!!

Claudio and Shakira.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR5OedOQ&fid=0x0:0x48345a9ff4590299"],"When":"2023-4-18"}]

He was very thorough with his assessment and found that our house (built in the 70's) still had the original asbestos siding underneath the vinyl! Communication was top notch from everyone. I received a phone call for every step of the way to update me on when materials arrived and when the work crew would be working. The crew did a great job. [{"Name":"Mark Adsuara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwx56gFXkACT_gQs0vnD5afmXVKUKPH-WnEEGlJmWNvfvdBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"1-Star Review – Absolute Nightmare – Do NOT Use This Company for Solar Roof Installation
I regret the day I ever hired this company to install solar panels on my roof. What was supposed to be an exciting upgrade to go green has turned into a three-four year ongoing disaster of leaks, water damage, mold, and endless frustration.
From the start, their installation was sloppy – poor flashing around the panels and shingles led to immediate water intrusion. We’ve had persistent leaks causing stained ceilings, warped drywall, and worst of all, mold growing in my daughter’s closet from the constant moisture. This isn’t just cosmetic; it’s a health hazard for my family.
Every time we’ve called them out (and they’ve charged us $450 each visit just to “inspect”), they stubbornly blame our chimney – even though two independent roofing companies have inspected and confirmed the leaks are directly from their shoddy shingle work and flashing around the solar mounts. One of their workers even argued aggressively with my wife inside our home when she pointed out it couldn’t be the chimney.
For three years, they’ve refused to take responsibility or fix their mistakes properly. No accountability, no real repairs, just excuses and bills. We’ve spent thousands on temporary fixes and damage control while they dodge warranty obligations.
This company prioritizes quick installs and sales over quality workmanship and customer care. If you’re considering solar with a new roof, run far away from these guys. Save yourself the headaches, health risks, and financial drain. Worst experience I’ve ever had with any contractor – zero stars if possible.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnkt2D1PWxLA4bL3sYaw6g&fid=0x0:0x87c17e5f2ffd500f"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Joseph DeMaria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJO59xBwClQigIwILXAOx8WOlA59lA_gDTnfRlGdAQ0tlSp-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend.
